title: Rhenus Logistics India is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Rhenus Logistics India is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Rhenus Logistics India invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Warehouse Manager at our Kolkata location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Rhenus Logistics India:
Rhenus Logistics India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery
• Proficiency in Cold Chain Logistics
• Proficiency in Reverse Logistics
• Proficiency in Vendor Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Professional development and training programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Rhenus Logistics India!
